content: Projects with risk score above 75 must be escalated to leadership. Projects delayed more than 10 days require corrective action plans.
Employees above 90 percent utilization for more than 30 days should be reviewed for burnout risk.
NPS below 5 indicates high churn risk. Enterprise customers with NPS below 5 require retention outreach.
Budget variance above 10 percent requires escalation and finance approval.
High-risk vendors must undergo quarterly review. Contracts expiring within 30 days should trigger renewal workflows.
